_about: Curated subset of the artifact's full_method_out.json for the demo notebook. Holds the 67 cached LLM-judge member-labeling results (member_labeling.per_member), the per-sub-context KG repair-loop stats (repair_loop), the (k) localization check, the gating check, the canonical two-track CCRG units, and the artifact verdict. The demo re-runs the CPU-only scoring (agreement vs shuffle null + bootstrap CI) on the cached judge picks and visualises the measured repair gains.
method_name: M5 Auditability for Two-Track CCRG Units (KG repair loop + LLM member-labeling)
